title: GitHub Copilot Cheat Sheet
description: A practical guide for engineers using GitHub Copilot for coding assistance.

commands.command: // Write a function to calculate the factorial of a number
commands.description: Generate a function implementation based on a descriptive comment.
commands.scenario: When you need to quickly implement a common algorithm without writing it from scratch.

commands.description: Trigger Copilot to suggest code completions in the editor.
commands.scenario: When you want to see code suggestions for the current line or block.

commands.command: // Create a REST API endpoint for user login
commands.description: Prompt Copilot to generate code for a REST API endpoint.
commands.scenario: When building backend services and needing boilerplate code.

commands.description: Request an explanation of the code snippet below the comment.
commands.scenario: When reviewing unfamiliar code and needing a quick understanding.

commands.command: // Add error handling to this function
commands.description: Enhance a function with error handling mechanisms.
commands.scenario: When improving code robustness by adding error checks.

commands.description: Prompt Copilot to suggest performance improvements for a function.
commands.scenario: When needing to enhance the efficiency of existing code.

commands.command: // Write unit tests for this function
commands.description: Generate unit tests for a given function.
commands.scenario: When ensuring code reliability by adding tests.

commands.command: // Convert this function to use async/await
commands.description: Refactor a function to use async/await syntax for asynchronous operations.
commands.scenario: When modernizing code to use asynchronous patterns.

commands.description: Generate documentation comments for a function.
commands.scenario: When improving code documentation for better maintainability.

commands.description: Prompt Copilot to generate a binary search algorithm implementation.
commands.scenario: When needing a quick implementation of a common search algorithm.

commands.command: // Create a class for a bank account with deposit and withdraw methods
commands.description: Generate a class structure with specified methods.

commands.command: // Refactor this code to improve readability
commands.description: Prompt Copilot to suggest code refactoring for better readability.
commands.scenario: When enhancing code maintainability by improving readability.

commands.command: // Generate a SQL query to find all users older than 30
commands.description: Prompt Copilot to create a SQL query based on a natural language description.
commands.scenario: When writing database queries without remembering exact SQL syntax.

commands.command: // Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application
commands.description: Generate a Dockerfile setup for containerizing a Node.js app.
commands.scenario: When setting up containerization for a Node.js project.

commands.description: Use the slash command in Copilot Chat to automatically identify and propose fixes for syntax errors or logical bugs in the selected code block.

commands.command: // Convert this code to TypeScript and define interfaces for all objects
commands.description: A prompt engineering pattern to migrate dynamic languages or plain JavaScript to strictly typed TypeScript by generating necessary type definitions.
Open the inline chat interface directly within the editor to perform quick, contextual code modifications without switching to the sidebar.

commands.command: // Create a mock implementation of this interface for testing
commands.description: A prompt pattern to accelerate test development by generating boilerplate mock objects and data structures based on existing type definitions.

commands.command: // Add JSDoc comments with @param and @returns types
commands.description: A specific documentation pattern to ensure Copilot generates standardized, IDE-friendly documentation that improves IntelliSense hover previews.
